description_long: This is a modern, two-story house with a flat roof and a sleek, rectangular design. The exterior is clad in horizontal gray siding with large windows arranged asymmetrically, providing ample natural light. The property features a driveway with two parked cars, a landscaped front yard, and a backyard with a swimming pool, green lawn, and a row of trees for privacy. There is a rooftop terrace with outdoor seating and a hot tub, as well as a fenced backyard area with a trampoline and play structure. The house includes multiple entry points, with the main entrance accessible via a short walkway and steps. The overall design emphasizes clean lines, open outdoor spaces, and a blend of functional and recreational areas.
description: A modern, two-story house with a flat roof, large windows, landscaped yards, and outdoor amenities including a pool and rooftop terrace.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, driveway with two cars, landscaped front yard, and a glimpse of the rooftop terrace.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the fenced backyard, trampoline, play structure, and the pool area with surrounding greenery.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the backyard pool, row of trees, and the full expanse of the rooftop terrace and outdoor spaces.
description_view_3: Opposite side view focusing on the pool, backyard lawn, and the rear architectural features of the house.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows
attribute_entryway_design: Main entry with a simple door, short steps, and a minimal overhang, integrated into the facade without ornate features.
